header.subtitle: Smart bunny care monitoring and activity journal system

auth.signInSubtitle: Sign in securely and quickly using a one-time password (OTP)
auth.registerWelcome: Welcome! This is your first time using this account. Please fill in your details to complete registration.

errors.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email format.
errors.invalidPhone: Please enter a valid phone number.
errors.emptyName: Please fill in your first and last name.

toasts.otpSent: OTP sent successfully! Your test code is [ {{otp}} ]
toasts.welcomeBack: Welcome back, {{name}}! You are now signed in.
toasts.otpVerified: Verified! No account found — please complete registration below.
toasts.loggedOut: You have been signed out of HKBR.

pets.heading: Pet Management
pets.description: Click on a pet to view health details, birth date, and vaccination history, or jump to monitoring.
pets.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, breed, or ID...

form.notesPlaceholder: Enter care notes for this pet...

pets.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete {{name}}'s record? This cannot be undone.

clips.title: {{name}} • Activity Playbacks
clips.description: Filter clips by behavior type or download for archiving.

logPreview.title: Activity Log Preview
logPreview.description: Review or edit the daily journal before sending to the pet parent
logPreview.includeClips: Include video clips in the journal (with AI-selected highlights)
logPreview.sendSuccess: Successfully sent {{name}}'s daily activity log to the parent!

toasts.cameraSwitch: Camera switched — loading bunny monitoring data.

clientView.bannerDescription: This is how the pet parent sees the daily journal on their device.
clientView.tipContent: Rabbits are typically most active during dawn and dusk when temperatures are mild. If you have any questions about this log or want to learn more about your pet's care, please contact our staff anytime using the button in the bottom right. Wishing your bunny a happy stay!

overview.emptyState: No cameras match the current filters.
